name: Central KY Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Central KY Sports Complex in Springfield, KY! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Old Armory
description: Old Armory is a place to play pickleball in Springfield, KY. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and water.
